summary.narrative: The Address Boulevard Unit 3812 is a 77.5 sqm (1-bedroom+study) investment apartment in Emaar's iconic Address Boulevard hotel-branded residences, situated at Sheikh Mohammed Bin Rashid Boulevard in the heart of Downtown Dubai. The unit was acquired in 2021 for AED 2.95M and has appreciated 21.3% to an assessed AED 3.58M (USD 974,834) — the highest appreciation rate in the portfolio. It is currently let to a British oil & gas consultant on an annual tenancy at AED 172,000/year (USD 46,800), producing a 4.80% net cap rate. The Address Boulevard commands a premium due to its 5-star hotel management, Burj Khalifa views, and access to all hotel amenities including pool deck, spa, and room service.
summary.keyMessage: USD 975K · AED 172K/yr rent · 4.80% cap rate · +21.3% appreciation since 2021 · Address Boulevard's branded residences premium

actions.title: Tenant Renewal — Annual Tenancy Expires May 2027
actions.recommendation: Downtown Dubai 1BR branded residences currently achieving AED 175,000–200,000/yr (Emaar/Address buildings). Target AED 178,000–185,000 on renewal — 3.5–7.6% uplift. Engage Espace Real Estate or Allsopp & Allsopp for renewal advisory in February 2027.
actions.decisionNeeded: No immediate action — monitor from Q1 2027

actions.title: Hotel Management Service Charge — Annual Review
actions.recommendation: Address Boulevard charges approximately AED 30/sqft/yr for full hotel services (AED 24,960/yr = $6,800/yr). This is higher than non-branded buildings but justified by the hotel amenity package that supports premium rental. Confirm 2026 RERA service charge index filing.

linkedDocuments.name: Title Deed — Unit 3812 Address Boulevard (Dubai Land Dept.)

topRisks.title: Downtown Dubai Oversupply
topRisks.impact: ~12,000 Downtown Dubai units in pipeline 2025–2027; partially offset by branded residence premium of Address Boulevard.

topRisks.title: Hotel Management Fee Pressure
topRisks.impact: Emaar Hospitality management fees are fixed at high end; any renegotiation would require collective owner action.

topRisks.title: O&G Sector Tenant Volatility
topRisks.impact: Tenant is energy sector consultant — departure risk if oil price cycle turns; Downtown Dubai well-diversified tenant base provides re-let confidence.

marketSnapshot.medianRentPM2: AED 140–175 / sqm / year (Downtown Dubai 1BR, hotel-branded, Q1 2026)
marketSnapshot.assetVsMarket: Subject: AED 2,219/sqm/yr — at lower end of Address branded comp set; upside on renewal to AED 2,300–2,500/sqm
